/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lfs_installer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/lfs_installer.dir/lfs_installer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lfs_installer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lfs_installer.dir/src/installerwindow.cpp.o -o lfs_installer  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.9.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.9.1
